texto: The crazy game of pilling stones was also in you and your friends’ marvelous innovation. And how really hard you would hit the phony big guy who you hated like anything.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a ChildHood: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The crazy game of pilling stones was also in you and your friends’ marvelous innovation. And how …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, memories, crazy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
